name: Curse of the Inept
entries: After a creature you can see that is cursed by your Evil Eye makes a {@variantrule D20 Test|XPHB}, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} and spend 1 Jinx Point to make the target reroll, and it must use the new roll.
After you use this Misfortune, the creature is no longer cursed by your Evil Eye.
